Hi, I'm

Pratik Dongre

Data Scientist by profession. Traveler by instinct. Reader by passion.

I build ML systems and predictive models on millions of records, publish research applying deep learning to cosmology, and write about books, mountains, and the quiet spaces where ideas grow.

View Research About Me GitHub

Research

CosmoMamba, AGN turbulence, cosmological simulations, and deep learning for astrophysics.

Projects

Fashion trend intelligence, NLP pipelines, and production data systems at scale.

Blog

Books, ideas, mountains, and the ways technology and philosophy intersect.
